Compared to 2D pixel videos, this multi-modal synergy aligns visual
articles.summary: 提出RGB-DF（同步RGB、深度与光流）多模态表示，用于机器人操作的4D世界模型。该表示物理基础扎实，能捕捉场景的4D动态，相比2D像素视频更有效地预测物体交互，为开放世界操作提供新思路。

articles.title: RynnWorld-Teleop: An Action-Conditioned World Model for Digital Teleoperation
articles.excerpt: Scaling robot learning requires massive, diverse trajectory data, yet collection is currently bottlenecked by physical teleoperation, where every demonstration binds operator time to specific hardware and workspaces. We introduce digital teleoperation, a paradigm that decouples data collection from physical constraints by replacing the real robot with a generative world model. In this framework, a
articles.summary: 提出数字遥操作范式，用生成式世界模型代替真实机器人收集轨迹数据，解除数据采集对物理硬件和工作空间的依赖，降低规模化机器人学习的数据收集瓶颈，实现更高效的数字演示。

articles.title: AlayaWorld: Long-Horizon and Playable Video World Generation
articles.excerpt: Game worlds have traditionally been built through labor-intensive production pipelines, making them costly to develop, difficult to customization, and expensive to modify after deployment. Recent advances in video world models offer a fundamentally different paradigm. Rather than explicitly authoring every component of a virtual environment, these models autoregressively synthesize future observat
articles.summary: 提出AlayaWorld，基于视频世界模型自动合成游戏世界，替代传统手工构建。通过自回归生成未来观察，实现长程、可交互的虚拟环境，大幅降低开发与修改成本。

articles.title: TurnOPD: Making On-Policy Distillation Turn-Aware for Efficient Long-Horizon Agent Training
articles.excerpt: On-policy distillation (OPD) trains a student policy by matching a stronger teacher on the student's own trajectories, offering a promising framework for language agent training. However, its application to long-horizon agentic tasks remains insufficiently explored. We identify two key inefficiencies in vanilla agent OPD: (1) full-horizon rollouts often waste wall-clock resources on tail turns tha
articles.summary: 针对同策略蒸馏在长程智能体任务中的效率问题，提出TurnOPD。通过识别全回合滚动中尾回合的资源浪费，引入turn-aware策略，加速语言智能体训练，减少墙壁时钟开销。

articles.title: Light-Omni: Reflex over Reasoning in Agentic Video Understanding with Long-Term Memory
articles.excerpt: Agentic video understanding equips models with long-term memory to autonomously process and respond to continuous, long-horizon multimodal streams. However, advanced video agents often rely on ``detective-style'' iterative reasoning for action control (e.g., search) and evidence aggregation, incurring prohibitive costs and latency. We argue that such heavy reasoning primarily compensates for the l
articles.summary: 提出Light-Omni，用反射式处理替代侦探式迭代推理，配合长期记忆实现高效智能体视频理解。降低推理成本与延迟，使模型能自主处理连续长程多模态流。

articles.title: LLM-as-a-Verifier: A General-Purpose Verification Framework
articles.excerpt: Scaling pre-training, post-training, and test-time compute have become the central paradigms for improving the capabilities of LLMs. In this work, we identify verification, the ability to determine the correctness of a solution, as a new scaling axis. articles.summary: 提出LLM-as-a-Verifier通用验证框架，将验证能力作为新的扩展轴。提供细粒度正确性判断，增强LLM在推理和生成中的可靠性，可与预训练、后训练并行扩展。

articles.title: Deform360: A Massive Multi-view Visuotactile Dataset for Deformable World Models

While current world models approach this through two distinct paradigms: learning the dynamics over the 2D pixel space or more explicit 3D geometric s
articles.summary: 推出Deform360，大规模多视角视触觉数据集，用于可变形物体动力学建模。融合2D像素空间与显式3D几何信息，为机器人操作世界模型提供基准。

articles.title: CompactionRL: Reinforcement Learning with Context Compaction for Long-Horizon Agents
articles.excerpt: Long-horizon agentic LLMs are increasingly limited by finite context windows, as extended interaction trajectories can exceed the maximum context length before a task is completed. Context compaction offers a natural solution by summarizing previous interaction states and continuing the rollout under a compressed context, but incorporating compaction into reinforcement learning remains underexplor
articles.summary: 提出CompactionRL，在强化学习训练中集成上下文压缩，通过总结历史交互状态延长有效上下文，解决长程智能体LLM的上下文窗口限制，提升任务完成能力。

articles.title: GaP: A Graph-as-Policy Multi-Agent Self-Learning Harness For Variational Automation Tasks
articles.excerpt: For robots to work reliably in commercial and industrial applications, can recent advances in agentic coding systems combine interpretable robot programming with the open-world adaptability of model-free policies? We focus on "Variational Automation" (VA), a class of tasks that have larger variations in object geometry and pose than fixed automation. Model-free policies often struggle to close the
articles.summary: 提出GaP（Graph-as-Policy）多智能体自学习框架，将图结构作为策略表示。融合可解释机器人编程与无模型自适应，适用于变分自动化任务中物体几何与位姿变化较大的场景。

articles.title: Multiplayer Interactive World Models with Representation Autoencoders
articles.excerpt: We introduce the first multiplayer world model for highly dynamic environments governed by complex physical interactions. Whereas single-player world models treat the other agents as part of the environment, ours conditions on the action streams of multiple agents, learning to attribute changes in the scene to the correct player and to stay coherent under arbitrary combinations of their actions. W
articles.summary: 提出首个多人世界模型，通过表示自编码器条件化多智能体动作流。能学习将场景变化正确归因于对应玩家，并在任意动作组合下保持一致性，适用于高动态物理环境。

articles.title: TREK: Distill to Explore, Reinforce to Refine
articles.excerpt: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is effective when the current policy already samples useful reasoning trajectories, but it stalls on hard prompts whose correct solution modes lie outside the student's on-policy support. We propose TREK (Teacher-Routed Exploration via Forward KL), a simple staged procedure that uses distillation not for imitation but for exploration support expansion. A k
articles.summary: 提出TREK，通过前向KL蒸馏从教师路由探索，扩展学生策略的支持域，再用强化学习精炼。克服GRPO在困难提示上的停滞，提升推理轨迹采样的覆盖度。

articles.title: MetaSkill-Evolve: Recursive Self-Improvement of LLM Agents via Two-Timescale Meta-Skill Evolution
articles.excerpt: Recent LLM agents tackle increasingly long-horizon, open-ended tasks, and external skills, reusable procedural knowledge supplied to the agent, further extend this capability. However, a fixed, hand-authored skill is rarely optimal, and cannot adapt to the diversity of tasks an agent encounters. Self-improving agents address this by rewriting their own skill files from execution traces, yielding m
articles.summary: 提出MetaSkill-Evolve，通过双时间尺度元技能演化实现递归自我改进。智能体从执行轨迹重写技能文件，自适应多样化任务，增强长期能力。

articles.title: EvoAgentBench: Benchmarking Agent Self-Evolution via Ability Transfer
articles.excerpt: Agent self-evolution in long-horizon LLM systems is largely procedural: useful experience is not merely stored information, but reusable procedures for searching, debugging, and verification. Yet current evaluations do not isolate this form of transfer. Agent benchmarks test single-episode task solving; memory benchmarks target information retention rather than procedural reuse. We introduce EvoAg
articles.summary: 推出EvoAgentBench，专门评估智能体自我演化中的能力迁移，聚焦过程性知识（搜索、调试、验证）的重用。不同于单任务记忆基准，测试可复用程序性经验的传递。

articles.title: Unified Audio Intelligence Without Regressing on Text Intelligence
articles.excerpt: Audio intelligence involves understanding, reasoning about, and generating both audio and speech. In this work, we introduce Nemotron-Labs-Audex-30B-A3B (Audex), a unified audio-text LLM built on Nemotron-Cascade-2-30B-A3B, a strong text-only MoE LLM. Audex adopts a simple unified design with a single Transformer decoder: audio inputs are encoded and projected into the text embedding space, while
articles.summary: 提出Audex统一音频文本LLM，基于Nemotron-Cascade-2 MoE架构。采用单Transformer解码器，将音频编码投影到文本嵌入空间，实现音频理解与生成，同时不退化文本智能。

articles.title: When Claws Remember but Do Not Tell: Stealthy Memory Injection in Persistent Personal Agents
articles.excerpt: Persistent personal agents combine long-term memory with access to users' external environments, enabling personalized foreground assistance and proactive background execution. This integration also creates a new path to compromise: untrusted external content can be silently written into persistent memory and later reused as trusted state. We study this threat as stealth memory injection, in which
articles.summary: 研究持久个人代理中的隐式记忆注入威胁。外部不可信内容可被静默写入持久内存，随后作为可信状态重用，导致安全风险。揭示了长期记忆与外部环境集成的新攻击面。
